text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 85 

SUBMTG_STATE_CD 

LABEL: Submitting State Entity Code 

DESCRIPTION: The ANSI numeric state code for the U.S. state, territory, or the District of Columbia that has 
submitted the data. 

SHORT NAME: SUBMTG_STATE_CD 

LONG NAME: SUBMTG_STATE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): All Annual Managed Care Plan files 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: FIPS state codes
